# Token Counter — Visualize GPT-4 Tokens in Real Time

> A free, real-time token counter and visualizer for GPT-4. Built for learners exploring the basics of LLMs and GenAI.

## What This Tool Does

- Counts words, characters, sentences and paragraphs from any input text
- Shows exact GPT-4 token counts using the real cl100k_base tokenizer
- Visualizes how GPT-4 splits text into tokens using color-coded pills
- Runs entirely in the browser — no data sent to any server

## Who It's For

Students, developers and curious minds learning how large language models process and tokenize text.

## Tech Stack

- HTML, Tailwind CSS, vanilla JavaScript
- gpt-tokenizer (cl100k_base) for exact GPT-4 token counts
- Deployed on GitHub Pages — fully static, no backend

## Source

- Live tool: https://snehaldutta.github.io/token-counter.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/snehaldutta/token-counter.io

## Author

- Built by Snehal — https://snehaldutta.github.io/snehal.io/
